canonical_answer: Two men stand side-by-side against a white brick wall. The man on the left wears a mustard yellow short-sleeved button-up shirt with vertical stripes. The man on the right wears a black and grey varsity-style jacket over a white t-shirt and a thick gold chain. The man on the left looks towards the man on the right.

question: Describe the visual progression of text overlays and scene composition from the beginning until the first cut to empty.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a pink-tinted city skyline appears with bold text reading 'I'M THE Last O.G.'; at 4s, two men stand side-by-side before a white brick wall as text adds 'BECAUSE...'; at 6s, large white letters update to state 'I STILL DRIVE A ELDORADO'; at 8s, the video cuts briefly to an empty screen before the next segment.

question: Describe the changes in personnel and text overlays during the interview segment starting at 10 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a man in a mustard yellow striped shirt appears alone against a white brick wall; at 11s, text overlays begin reading 'I DON'T KNOW'; at 13s, the text expands to say 'ALL MY KIDS BY THEIR FIRST NAME'; at 14s, a second man wearing a varsity jacket enters the frame to stand beside him.
